title: Smoke Pistachio German Stir-fry
description: A fresh, velvety German dish featuring pistachios and smoke flavors that serve as a hangover-cure alternative. Suitable for those who are vegan or seeking kosher-friendly meal options.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of fresh pistachios
ingredients.notes: Soaked in water for at least an hour

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons of olive oil or vegan butter
1/4 cup of red wine or apple cider vinegar

instructions: Preheat your smoker grill to about 250°F (or if using a stove-top, heat the olive oil or vegan butter in a skillet over medium-high heat. Make sure it is hot enough to sizzle when you add the pistachios and onion.)
In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onions until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for about 30 seconds, stirring constantly.
Fold in the soaked pistachios and let them toast slightly before adding the lemon juice, red wine/vinegar, salt, and spinach. Stir everything together well.
Cook for about 5 minutes until the spinach is wilted, adjusting the seasoning as necessary. The mixture should be velvety and flavorful.
Transfer the stir-fry to a plate or bowl, garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
